data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario regarding quiet hours.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate the behavior of the system during quiet hours (no SMS from 10pm-8am). However, the evidence does not provide any specific details or outcomes related to this scenario, nor does it confirm whether the system adheres to the quiet hours requirement. Without concrete evidence or traces demonstrating the system's behavior during the specified hours, the validation cannot be conclusively assessed.
gaps: No evidence confirming system behavior during quiet hours (10pm-8am).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for quiet hours compliance
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that no SMS notifications are sent during quiet hours.
